title: シークレット・ノート！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm off today, and while I'm looking for a place to
sit and eat in the early afternoon...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I notice a curious-looking notebook under one of
the seats.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Aha! Found it! El's Strongest Notebook in the
World—Número Cuatro!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Thank goodness! I've been looking everywhere for
it!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
So it was here all along, huh? I musta dropped it
while I was eating my super ultra spicy sandwich
earlier...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Bueno! Muchas gracias for picking it up! I can't
thank you enough, no matter how many
languages I use!
choice_data_list: That notebook must be really important to you.
That notebook must be really important to you.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Sí! When my papa was a wrestler, he used to write
down new moves in a notebook just like this!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
In other words, that notebook is filled with all the
tricks I've discovered for running and other
special info—

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! I'll tell ya one of the secrets in this
notebook as my way of thanking you!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I recommend the "El-Style Power Training
Program" or "Tips for Race Running on a Clear
Day"! What'll it be?!
choice_data_list: Tips for Race Running on a Clear Day.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Yooooou got it! Consider yourself guaranteed to
explode with power!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Now lend me your ears! This is confidential stuff,
y'know!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: So this is what you gotta do! Whisper, whisper, whisper...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ooh! Going for the fair-weather offense tricks,
huh? An excellent choice, if I do say so myself!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Now lend me your ears! This is confidential stuff,
y'know!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: So this is what you gotta do! Whisper, whisper, whisper...
